brief: Extend brix.core with total pure Bool/Int helpers useful at call sites: `fn not_(x: Bool) -> Bool = if x then false else true`, `fn and_(a: Bool, b: Bool) -> Bool = if a then b else false`, `fn or_(a: Bool, b: Bool) -> Bool = if a then true else b`, `fn choose(cond: Bool, a: Int, b: Int) -> Int = if cond then a else b`, `fn choose(cond: Bool, a: Float, b: Float) -> Float = if cond then a else b` (typed overload). Exact `fn`/`=` syntax. Preserve Id/identity decls. Host formats after check.
